actions.name: Morningstar
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (3d8 + 8) piercing damage.

actions.name: Rock
actions.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, range 60/240 ft., one target. Hit: 30 (4d10 + 8) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Fog Cloud
actions.description: You create a 20-foot-radius sphere of fog centered on a point within range. The sphere spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. It lasts for the duration or until a wind of moderate or greater speed (at least 10 miles per hour) disperses it.

actions.name: Telekinesis
actions.description: You gain the ability to move or manipulate creatures or objects by thought. When you cast the spell, and as your action each round for the duration, you can exert your will on one creature or object that you can see within range, causing the appropriate effect below. You can affect the same target r

special_abilities.name: Multiattack
special_abilities.description: The giant makes two morningstar attacks.

special_abilities.name: Keen Smell
special_abilities.description: The giant has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.

special_abilities.name: Innate Spellcasting
special_abilities.description:
The giant's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma. It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

At will: detect magic, fog cloud, light
3/day each: feather fall, fly, misty step, telekinesis
1/day each: control weather, gaseous form

bonus_actions.name: Misty Step
bonus_actions.description: Briefly surrounded by silvery mist, you teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space that you can see.
